name: convert_office_to_pdf
description: Convert Office documents to PDF using Gotenberg's LibreOffice engine. Supports a wide range of formats including .docx (Word), .xlsx (Excel), .pptx (PowerPoint), .odt, .ods, .odp, .csv, .txt, .rtf, and more. Upload one or more Office files and receive a PDF. When multiple files are provided, each is converted and merged into a single PDF. This is useful for converting business documents, reports, and spreadsheets to a portable PDF format.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more Office document files to convert. Supported formats: .docx, .doc, .xlsx, .xls, .pptx, .ppt, .odt, .ods, .odp, .csv, .tsv, .txt, .rtf, .html, .xml. Sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: landscape
parameters.description: Set to 'true' for landscape orientation. Default is 'false'. Applies to all documents in the request.

parameters.name: nativePageRanges
parameters.description: Page ranges to convert, e.g., '1-5' or '1,3,5-9'. If not specified, all pages are converted.

parameters.name: merge
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to merge all converted documents into a single PDF. Default is 'false' (returns the first document only if multiple are provided without merge).
